official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for constructing and encoding the Play clientbound system_chat fixture.
Official binary source for the Play clientbound packet table and system_chat packet id.

field_notes.component: Simple Component.literal text fixture only; does not prove rich component, translation, style, click/hover, signed chat, or HUD behavior.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound system_chat packet framing and dispatch/decode for one simple Component.literal plus false overlay fixture only; do not infer rich Component, chat HUD behavior, signed chat behavior, or client-load completion.
